---
title: "Happy New Ear!"
description: "Happy new ear!"
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-01-21"
categories: [personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Image: alwayspets.com. ([Source](https://www.alwayspets.com/s/interesting-bunny-facts-228f9c6b11074c57))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Happy new ear!

(Image: <https://www.alwayspets.com/s/interesting-bunny-facts-228f9c6b11074c57>)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_happy-new-ear-image-httpslnkdingx3ssm4n-activity-7022808490821783552-8zvu).*
